title: AgentCo-op: Retrieval-Based Synthesis of Interoperable Multi-Agent Workflows
summary: AgentCo-op: Retrieval-Based Synthesis of Interoperable Multi-Agent Workflows
whyItMatters: Designing multi-agent workflows is especially difficult in open-ended scientific settings where tasks lack curated training sets, reliable scalar evaluation metrics, and standardized interfaces between existing tools and agents. We propose AgentCo-op, a retrieval-based synthesis framework that composes reusable skills, tools, and external agents into execut…
